name: Site Deploy Orchestration
description: High-level deployment orchestrator that deploys sites from source to any supported cloud provider (Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, DigitalOcean, Netlify, Heroku, AWS, Linode, Railway, Fly.io) with optional custom domain registration and DNS configuration via any supported registrar (Porkbun, Namecheap, GoDaddy, Cloudflare).

extensions.description: Deploy a site from source to a cloud provider with optional domain setup

features: Auto-detect framework from source (Next.js, React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Node, Python, static)
Auto-select optimal cloud provider based on framework
Deploy to 9 cloud providers via delegated tool calls
Register and configure custom domains via 4 registrar integrations
Dry-run mode to preview deployment plan without executing
Comprehensive result with deployment URL and domain status
